name: Dawn of Corruption RPG
description:
Content Warning: Contains Muscle Growth, Size Growth, Possible Involuntary Transformation, Dubious Consent/Non-Con, Corruption, Parasites/Infestation, Gore, Possible Character and/or User Death, and Possible Vore

Dawn of Corruption is a fantasy NSFW RPG about exploring a mysterious world and the substance that turns men into massive monstrous beasts.

What will you grow into? Will Corruption seep into your being or can you resist long enough to be the championed hero of this story?

I haven’t seen many Dawn of Corruption themed bots on this site so I figured I’d take matters into my own desperate hands ᕕ(ᐛ)ᕗ

This is easily one of the most ambitious bots I’ve ever made and the first I’ve released publicly! So enjoy if this is your kind of thing, and PLEASE let me know what errors you run into or if there’s anything from the Dawn of Corruption game I should add!

Obligatory WIP notice, but more definitely will be added in the future.

Credit to Voidlesky for the artwork and Sombreve as the developer of the Dawn of Corruption game!
creator: Ferrokahn
